<!-- What problem does this change solve, and what behavior does it introduce? -->

## Verification

<!-- List the exact automated tests and manual checks run. -->

- [ ] Relevant unit tests pass
- [ ] Relevant UI tests pass or are not applicable
- [ ] Light and dark appearance checked for visible changes
- [ ] Compact and regular window sizes checked for layout changes

## Evidence

<!-- Add before/after screenshots or a recording for visible changes. Remove this section if not applicable. -->

## Impact

- [ ] No stored-data or migration impact
- [ ] No analytics, adaptive-model, benchmark, or export-contract impact
- [ ] No privacy, networking, logging, or dependency impact
- [ ] Accessibility behavior has been considered
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated where needed

<!-- Explain every unchecked item that applies. -->
